text:
Xiaoli Jin
Xiaoli Jin is a Senior Language Lecturer of Chinese at NYU Shanghai. She received her BA in Teaching Chinese as a Foreign Language from East China Normal University and her MA in Chinese Language and Literature from San Francisco State University. Prior to joining NYU Shanghai, she served as an assistant professor at the Defense Language Institute in the United States, where she taught Chinese across all levels. She also taught advanced-level courses in the Diplomats’ Chinese Language Program at East China Normal University for five years.

text_blocks.text: Xiaoli Jin is a Senior Language Lecturer of Chinese at NYU Shanghai. She received her BA in Teaching Chinese as a Foreign Language from East China Normal University and her MA in Chinese Language and Literature from San Francisco State University. Prior to joining NYU Shanghai, she served as an assistant professor at the Defense Language Institute in the United States, where she taught Chinese across all levels. She also taught advanced-level courses in the Diplomats’ Chinese Language Program at East China Normal University for five years.
